message:
test(bd-2j84): add rate_limiting.rs coverage for window expiry, edge cases

Cover sliding window request expiry after window passes,
current_requests reset after window, 60-second boundary minute
formatting, token bucket try_consume(0) edge case, and zero
refill rate never refilling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
